verification_performed: Confirmed the task is enabled on the board
Confirmed the brief and handoff are present in 05_INBOX_FROM_MANAGER
Confirmed this remains paper-only / observation-mode work
Read the confidence generation path in recommendation_api.py
Read the bridge approval path in model_bridge.py
Read the shadow recommendation log sample
Ran narrow read-only trade-history queries against trades_sports.db to compute bucketed outcome performance
Recomputed confidence buckets with and without the known outlier set {183,184,185,316} to separate contamination from structural calibration failure

calibration_summary.confidence_generation_path: confidence is computed in recommendation_api.py as edge_score * infer_result.data_quality * spread_quality, then passed through model_bridge.py with minimum-threshold and freshness filtering
calibration_summary.verdict: Confidence is not calibrated in a monotonic, usable way. It is not cleanly inverted across the whole range, but it is structurally unreliable and higher-confidence bands are materially bad in the historical sample.

inversion_monotonicity_summary.confidence_inverted: Not cleanly or globally. The strongest apparent inversion in 0.30-0.40 is mostly an outlier artifact.
inversion_monotonicity_summary.monotonicity: Broken. Outcome quality does not improve as confidence rises; 0.60+ bands are especially poor.
inversion_monotonicity_summary.usable_confidence_bands: No robust usable confidence band is proven from this sample. The 0.30-0.40 bucket loses its apparent advantage once known outliers are removed, and the 0.60+ buckets remain deeply negative.
inversion_monotonicity_summary.contamination_note: Known outliers explain most of the raw low-confidence bucket strength, but even after removing them the confidence ladder still does not become healthy or monotonic.

recommended_next_enabled_task: MLB_NEAR_RESOLUTION_SANITY_AUDIT_001. This input-path audit already showed that market-price / near-resolution awareness is stronger in the post-model layer than in the model core, and this calibration audit showed confidence is structurally unreliable. The next enabled task should explain how near-dead markets can still become actionable despite the current signal/confidence stack.
